REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,710.50 RE 22361 FOR TRANSACTION W0808C15D006 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO JEAN WONG, DOC 1901718818, WARRANT #38002680, DATED JAN-21-2009

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S, VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. RACHEL CHU INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON THE PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
